tool.name: bedToBigBed
tool.description: convert a sorted BED to the indexed binary bigBed format
tool.command: ln -sf '$bed' 'input.bed' && ln -sf '$chrom_sizes' 'chrom.sizes' && #if $as_file ln -sf '$as_file' 'fields.as' && #end if bedToBigBed -type='$type' #if $as_file -as=fields.as #end if $tab 'input.bed' 'chrom.sizes' '$output'

param.label: Sorted BED
param.help: BED file sorted by chrom then chromStart (sort -k1,1 -k2,2n). May carry extra typed columns.

param.label: Chromosome sizes
param.help: Two-column file: chrom name and size in bases.

param.label: BED type
param.help: bedN[+[P]] declaring the number of standard BED columns and any extra fields, e.g. bed3+1, bed6+, bed12+8.

validator.message: Expected a bedN, bedN+ or bedN+P type string

param.name: as_file
param.label: AutoSql (.as) definition
param.help: AutoSql file describing the extra fields. Required when the BED carries non-standard columns (the '+' part of -type).

param.label: Tab-separated input
param.help: Parse input as strictly tab-separated, allowing spaces inside fields (recommended for MAF/lstring columns).

tool.help:
**bedToBigBed** — convert a sorted BED file into the indexed binary **bigBed** format used by genome browsers and track hubs.
bigBed is a compressed, R-tree-indexed representation of BED data that can be served over HTTP and queried by region without downloading the whole file — the standard delivery format for custom annotation tracks in a UCSC track hub.
-----
**Input**
- `Sorted BED` — must be sorted by `chrom` then `chromStart` (`sort -k1,1 -k2,2n`). Extra typed columns beyond the standard BED fields are allowed when declared via the type/AutoSql below. - `Chromosome sizes` — two columns: sequence name and length in bases (e.g. from `faToTwoBit` + `twoBitInfo`, or `samtools faidx` .fai cut 1,2). - `AutoSql (.as)` — optional; required whenever the BED has non-standard columns (the `+` portion of the type). For bigMaf use `bed3+1` with a `bedMaf`/`bigMaf` AutoSql definition.
**Output**
- A `bigbed` dataset (magic `0x8789F2EB`).
-----
**Key options**
- `-type` — `bedN[+[P]]` declaring standard BED column count and extra fields. - `-as` — AutoSql definition describing the extra fields. - `-tab` — treat input as strictly tab-separated (needed when fields, such as a MAF block, contain spaces).
